description.value: Price 50,312 gp; Slot none; CL 9th; Weight 8 lbs.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION The flanges on the head of this +1 axiomatic heavy mace are shaped like skeleton keys. Three times per day as a swift or immediate action when making a melee attack with the mace, the wielder can trigger this maceâs unlocking ability. This ability must be declared before the melee attack is rolled, and if the attack is unsuccessful, the unlocking ability is wasted. Upon a successful melee attack with the mace while using the unlocking ability, the wielder can attempt a combat maneuver check against the targetâs CMD. On a success, the mace causes an item on the target in the belt, shoulder, or neck slot to come loose and fall to the ground in the targetâs space. In addition, when attempting to destroy a lock, the mace ignores up to 20 points of the lockâs hardness. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 25,312 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells knock, passwall
